items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Says It Is Discussing Plan With U.S. to End Hostilities
items.summary: The one-page proposal under review would open the Strait of Hormuz and pause the fighting for 30 days, but differences remain over American demands on Iran’s nuclear program.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: How operation to disembark passengers on virus-hit cruise will work
items.summary: The BBC's Guy Hedgecoe reports from Tenerife, where some locals fear the ship's arrival could bring health risks.

items.title: Former U.S. analyst, once jailed for spying for Israel, to run for Israeli parliament
items.summary: Jonathan Pollard, a former U.S. intelligence analyst who served 30 years for spying for Israel, says he will run in the upcoming Israeli elections.
